case_title: AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES,INC VS. LUIS MEJIA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES,INC ON DEFENDANT MEJIA, LUIS
